name: Galactoarabinan
description: Galactoarabinan, often referred to as GA, is a polysaccharide extracted from western larch. It facilitates the distribution of ingredients in a product, so it is often found in solar products, it improves the SPF. Studies havealso shown that it can minimize fine lines, act as a gentle exfoliator and prevent moisture loss. It is a good moisturizing ingredient for the skin
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Geraniol
description: Geraniol, also known as rhodinol, is a monoterpene alcohol that is one of the allergens regulated by Europe. It is found in geranium and lemongrass essential oils, as well as rose and palmarosa oils. It is used in perfumery for its rose scent.
note: Low penalty in all categories. Происхождение: Natural.

description: Geranium Maculatum Oil — косметический ингредиент.

name: Geranyl Acetate
description: Geranyl acetate is an aromatic compound found in many essential oils, such as citronella, palmarosa, lemongrass, and coriander. With its floral and fruity (rose) scent, it is one of the allergens regulated in Europe.
note: Low penalty in all categories. Происхождение: Natural.

name: Glucose
description: Glucose is a simple sugar that is in the form of a white solid crystal or in aqueous solution. It is naturally produced by plants during photosynthesis. It is used in many cosmetic products for its power of water retention (humectant). It is authorized in organic.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Glyceryl Caprylate
description: Glyceryl caprylate is a monoester of glycerine with caprylic acid. It is mainly used as a co-emulsifier to stabilize O/W emulsions and surfactants. For its antimicrobial effects, it is most often used as a preservative, in the fight against acne to soften and moisturize. In some cases, its antimicrobial activity makes it possible to dispense with traditional preservatives.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Glyceryl Citrate Crosspolymer
description: This polymer is obtained from glycerin and citric acid. It is easily biodegradable.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Glyceryl Linoleate
description: Glyceryl Linoleate — косметический ингредиент.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике.

name: Glycerin
description: Glycerol or glycerol is part of the family of polyalcohols, it can be produced synthetically from petroleum derivatives, or from animal or vegetable fats by saponification. It is in the form of a colorless liquid, hygroscopic (which absorbs moisture) and syrupy.Glycerine is used for its high moisturizing, occlusive (protects the skin of aggressions), emollient (smooth skin and hair) or humectant (allows a product to maintain its fluid appearance).It has been demonstrated (2005, Andersen) that it has anti-inflammatory power when incorporated into potentially irritating products, such as those using Sodium lauryl sulfate.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Glyceryl Rosinate
description: Glycerol rosinate is an ester of rosin and glycerol. Its high density allows it to keep oils suspended in water. Therefore, it is often used as a stabilizer in beverages and is quite common in chewing gum. In cosmetics, it is primarily used in wax for hair removal, mascaras, and lipsticks. It is permitted in organic/bio products.
note: Low penalty in all categories. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Glyceryl Behenate
description: Glyceryl Behenate — косметический ингредиент.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике.

name: Glyceryl Stearate
description: Glycerol stearate is used as a non-ionic emulsifier or emollient in cosmetic products. It is widely used in moisturizers and is also found in hair care products for its antistatic properties. It can be derived from palm, olive or rapeseed oil... It is  confirmed organic.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Synthetic.

name: Glyceryl Laurate
description: Glyceryl Laurate — косметический ингредиент.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике.

name: Glyceryl Oleate
description: The glyceryl oleate is obtained from oils and fats of natural origin. It is a fatty acid ester that has softening and softening properties, it is used as a stabilizing agent in O / W (oil / water) type emulsions. Allowed in Bio.
common_product_types: 2-in-1 shampoo and body wash for baby (32.59%)
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Glyceryl Stearate Se
description: Glyceryl Stearate SE is a monoester of glycerine and stearic acid. The term “SE” designates a ‘Special’ grade that enhances the functions of classic “Glyceryl Stearate”. Of plant origin, it has a hydrophilic-lipophilic ratio (HLB) of 5 to 8 for creating water-in-oil emulsions. It emulsifies both aqueous and oily phases. It can also be used as a co-emulsifier, acting as a stabilizer and thickener in a wide range of cosmetics.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Glycine
description: Glycine is a non-essential amino acid (produced by our bodies), not to be confused with its botanical namesake “Glycine Max”, which stands for soy, or with Glycine, a climbing plant common in our gardens, identified by its botanical name “Wisteria sinensis”,which have absolutely nothing to do with each other. In this case, glycine plays an essential role in protein synthesis, particularly that of our body's collagen. It is present in large quantities in the NMF (Natural Moisturizing Factors) of the skin. It can be used as a dietary supplement and in cosmetics, for its moisturizing, antioxidant and healing properties.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Animal.

name: Glycol Distearate
description: Glycol distearate is produced by the esterification of stearic acid or its esters with ethylene glycol. It comes in the form of a waxy white solid cream that is used to condition the skin or hair. It is also used as a thickener and gives the creams a pearly appearance. The ingredient can come from either animal origin (cows, pigs ...) or from plants such as soybean oil and canola oil.
note: Low penalty in all categories. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Glycolic Acid
description: Glycolic acid is a natural organic acid, also called alpha-hydroxy acids (AHA). It is usually made from sugar cane. It is used in mild peels and acid-based exfoliators. It accelerates the loss of dead cells and promotes cell renewal. Like other fruit acids, it is also used to smooth wrinkles, lighten the complexion, fade pigments and irregularities of the skin. It is not allowed in organic.
note: Считается безопасным для использования в косметике. Происхождение: Vegetal.

name: Glyoxylic Acid
description: In an article published in the New England Journal of Medicine in March 2024, French researchers warn that the use of glyoxylic acid in hair straightening products is associated with a risk of acute renal failure through the accumulation of calcium oxalate crystals in the kidneys.The researchers state that "Given the potential nephrotoxicity of topical glyoxylic acid, products containing this compound should be avoided and, in our opinion, withdrawn from the market".For these reasons, this ingredient is displayed in red on INCI Beauty.
note: Рекомендуется избегать в косметических продуктах.

name: Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride
description: This ingredient is a synthetic quat (quaternary ammonium) derived from Guar gum. It acts as a conditioning agent for skin and hair, it also has antistatic properties. It is one of the synthetic molecules that are an exception in the COSMOS specifications: it is therefore authorized in organic. Note that Guar Gum is obtained from the seed of a legume (Cyamopsis tetragonoloba).
note: Требует осторожности при использовании. Происхождение: Vegetal.
